parsed_output.justification: Caitlynn explicitly claims to be a werewolf. Mitchell claims to be the Robber who robbed Caitlynn, and Alana claims to be the Troublemaker who swapped Mitchell and Caitlynn. According to this sequence, Caitlynn would have started as a werewolf, lost the role to Mitchell, and then regained it via the Troublemaker's swap, making her the werewolf at the end of the night.
